name: Italian Meatballs in a Basket
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly shape ground beef into 1 1/2-inch balls.
2. Heat margarine in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add the meatballs and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
3. Add chopped green pepper and onion to the meatballs; stir and cook for another 5 minutes.
4. Drain the tomatoes, reserving the liquid. Stir the drained tomatoes, all but 1/4 cup of the tomato liquid, basil, and thyme into the meatballs. Cover tightly and cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
5. Mix the reserved tomato liquid with flour until smooth. Stir this mixture into the meatballs, cover tightly, and cook over low heat for another 5 minutes.
6. Prepare the Italian Bread Basket by cutting a 3/4 slice from the top of the bread. Scoop out the inside of the bread, leaving about an inch of bread on all sides and bottom of the loaf. Place the loaf on foil in a shallow baking pan.
7. Brush the top, sides, and inside of the bread with melted margarine and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese. Bake in a hot oven (400 Degrees F.) for 10 minutes.
-------------------------GARNISHES-------------------------
1 x Green pepper rings
1 x Cherry tomatoes
